title: Bible Prophecy Series
subTitle: King Jesus gathering Israel
summary: “When they therefore were come together, they asked of him, saying, Lord, wilt thou at this time restore again the kingdom to Israel?” (Acts 1:6). This was the wrong question to ask the Lord Jesus? There is no kingdom to restore again to Israel because the kingdom belongs to Jesus. The correct question should have been: “Lord, will thou at this time restore the kingdom to yourself?” All prophecies declared that the Lord Jesus would gather Israel from the four corners of the earth, bring them back to the Holy Land and reign as King over them. “Of the increase of his government and peace there shall be no end, upon the throne of David, and upon his kingdom, to order it, and to establish it with judgment and with justice from henceforth even forever. The zeal of the LORD of hosts will perform this” (Isaiah 9:7). Please keep in mind that the current government of Israel is not a kingdom, but a parliamentary democracy. In other words, we need to look for a son, who is the everlasting Father, who will return and establish an eternal kingdom in Israel today. This can only be the Lord Jesus Christ. Be assured of one thing, saints of God, God is not a man that he should lie – he will not rest until he is crowned King of Israel.
